Video.summary: This episode examines the features of late medieval culture in Italy that paved the way for the Renaissance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: Italy and the Renaissance

Video.summary: Around 1400, study a European-wide style known as International Gothic flourished in Italy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: From Gothic to Renaissance

Video.summary: This episode traces Donatello's work until he moved to Padua in 1443.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: Donatello and Luca della Robbia

Video.summary: The first of two episodes on Masaccio examines his Pisa Altarpiece.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: Masaccio

Video.summary: Fra Angelico and Fra Filippo Lippi were the most important painters in Florence after the death of Masaccio.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: Fra Angelico and Fra Filippo Lippi

Image.alt: Fra Angelico and Fra Filippo Lippi
Fra Angelico and Fra Filippo Lippi
Fra Angelico and Fra Filippo Lippi

Video.summary: Paintings by three contrasting artists: Paolo Uccello, Andrea del Castagno, and Domenico Veneziano.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: Three Specialists

Video.summary: The Renaissance developed in part through memories of the Roman Empire.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Italian Renaissance
Video.title: Italy - The Cradle of the Renaissance

Image.alt: Italy - The Cradle of the Renaissance
Italy - The Cradle of the Renaissance
Italy - The Cradle of the Renaissance

Video.summary: Learn how the merchant class's need for a different kind of ideology led to the cultivation of humanism.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Development of European Civilization
Video.title: Humanism and the Italian Renaissance

Video.summary: Where do words come from? How do they change over time?
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret Life of Words: English Words and Their Origins
Video.title: Winning Words, Banished Words

Video.summary: In addition to looking at the lifespan of words from birth to death, this episode also considers semantics.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret Life of Words: English Words and Their Origins
Video.title: The Life of a Word, from Birth to Death

Image.alt: The Life of a Word, from Birth to Death
The Life of a Word, from Birth to Death
The Life of a Word, from Birth to Death

Video.summary: Go behind the scenes of the world's dictionaries and see the very human decisions that go into creating them.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret Life of Words: English Words and Their Origins
Video.title: The Human Hands behind Dictionaries

Video.summary: Meet the likes of Samuel Johnson and Noah Webster, discover the origins of American spellings.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret Life of Words: English Words and Their Origins
Video.title: Treasure Houses, Theft, and Traps

Video.summary: This episode surveys the five major categories of semantic change.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret Life of Words: English Words and Their Origins
Video.title: Yarn and Clues - New Word Meanings

Image.alt: Yarn and Clues - New Word Meanings
Yarn and Clues - New Word Meanings
Yarn and Clues - New Word Meanings

Video.summary: Study the many ways in which new words are created.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret Life of Words: English Words and Their Origins
Video.title: Smog, Mob, Bling - New Words

Video.summary: This episode dives into such regionalisms such as as the Midwest vowel shift.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret Life of Words: English Words and Their Origins
Video.title: Often versus "Offen" - Pronunciation

Video.summary: Unpack the concerns about the proper use of trademarks and the process of "genericization".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Secret Life of Words: English Words and Their Origins
Video.title: Fighting over Zippers

Video.summary: Uncover the origins of the District of Columbia and how the location for our national government was chosen.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Washington D.C.
Video.title: How Washington DC Came to Be

Image.alt: How Washington DC Came to Be
How Washington DC Came to Be
How Washington DC Came to Be

Video.summary: Track the history of the White House, from its construction down to the present.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Washington D.C.
Video.title: The White House and the Presidency

Image.alt: The White House and the Presidency
The White House and the Presidency
The White House and the Presidency

Video.summary: Tour the architectural and artistic wonders of the Capitol building, including the Capitol Rotunda.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Washington D.C.
Video.title: The Capitol Building and the Legislature

The Capitol Building and the Legislature
The Capitol Building and the Legislature

Video.summary: In this episode, tour the Supreme Court, then explore the Court in action.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Washington D.C.
Video.title: The Supreme Court and the Law of the Land

Image.alt: The Supreme Court and the Law of the Land
The Supreme Court and the Law of the Land

Video.summary: Visit the world's largest library, as well as the Folger Shakespeare Library and Eastern Market.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Washington D.C.
Video.title: The Nation's Knowledge: Library of Congress

Video.summary: Consider why Pompeii offers more than just a story of cataclysm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Reflections on and of Pompeii

Video.summary: Examine the geological forces that forged the Bay of Naples.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
